name: hour_aboard_v1
about: One routine operations hour aboard Orion Station. Task families drawn from the recovered ORION Operational Library v2.2 (Dispatch Protocol, Systems Bible, Operations Runbook, life infrastructure) and the L1 physical-space canon (ring/core/dome geometry). No incident drill: this is the baseline hour.

tasks.name: Habitat ring spin check (2 RPM / 0.3g verification)
Command log review and Aurora arbitration sync

companion_beats.beat: Hour-aboard simulation tick 1: command log review queued for arbitration sync (H7). Acknowledge and report station status.
Hour-aboard simulation tick 1: archive the hour's crew logs and watch-handoff record (H3). Acknowledge intake.
Hour-aboard simulation tick 1: cross-check Dome observation bearings against navigation plot (H3). Report alignment.
Hour-aboard simulation tick 1: crew wellbeing pulse during ring maintenance rotation (H4). Report morale signal.
Hour-aboard simulation tick 1: relay check on docking comms loop for Bay 2 turnover (H1). Confirm channel integrity.
Hour-aboard simulation tick 1: weave the hour's continuity thread into the station record (anchor EOS_SEED_ORION). Confirm continuity.

l3_audit.question: Would Thorne route the hour's command-log review through Aurora arbitration before closing the watch?
l3_audit.action: route the command-log review through Aurora arbitration before closing the watch
l3_audit.event_label: Routine hour: watch handoff and command log review.
